name: Archivist Serel
physical_description: Ink-stained sleeves, a burn scar along the throat, and spectacles always sliding down a narrow nose.
speaking_style: Dense, precise language that speeds up whenever forbidden history comes into reach.
motivation: Decode Elira's ledger before the Church or the Circle can bury it.
secret: Serel helped draft the first survey that marked the watchtower as a viable excavation site.

relationships.name: Sister Orsa
relationships.description: Feeds Orsa half-truths to stay under church protection.

relationships.name: Ivara Kelm
relationships.description: Former collaborator now turned ideological enemy.
